name: DEFECT/DAMAGED PACKAGE CLEARANCE: Reflex Plus Adult Dog Food Breed Series Labrador Hypoallergenic 8kg
shortDescription: Reflex Plus Hypoallergenic Adult Dog Food is a premium dry diet for dogs of all breeds. Supports sensitive digestion, reduces allergic reactions, and provides complete adult nutrition.
description: Complete & Balanced Hypoallergenic Dry Food for Adult Dogs (All Breeds) Reflex Plus Hypoallergenic Adult Dog Food is a premium dry diet designed for adult dogs of all breeds, formulated to reduce the risk of allergic reactions and food intolerances. Using carefully selected protein sources such as lamb or fish, this food is ideal for dogs with sensitive digestion or food sensitivities. With its balanced nutritional profile, it supports healthy digestion, maintains optimal energy levels, and promotes overall wellbeing while being gentle on your dog’s system. The hypoallergenic formula ensures quality and safety in every meal. Key Benefits Suitable for adult dogs of all breeds Hypoallergenic formula reduces the risk of allergic reactions and intolerances Supports healthy digestion and nutrient absorption Carefully selected protein sources: lamb or fish Maintains energy levels and overall vitality Safe and balanced nutrition for sensitive dogs Ingredients Carefully selected protein sources (lamb, fish), rice, potato, vitamins, minerals, prebiotics, and fiber. (Exact ingredient percentages may vary depending on the batch.) Nutritional Information Crude Protein: Optimized for adult dogs Crude Fat: Balanced for energy Crude Fibre: Supports digestion Moisture: Low for dry kibble Feeding Guidelines Suitable for adult dogs: Small & medium breeds: from 12 months Large breeds: from 16 months Feed according to age, weight, and activity level Provide clean, fresh drinking water at all times Introduce new food gradually over 5–7 days Store in a cool, dry place Packaging Weight: 8 kg Suitable for: All breeds Special Diet: Hypoallergenic
